parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
const summary = [
  '=== CLUSTER HEALTH (checkClusterHealth detailed) ===',
  j.clusterHealthResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== NODE CONDITIONS (checkNodeConditions) ===',
  j.nodeConditionsResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== RESOURCE ISSUES (detectResourceIssues cpu>'+j.cpuThreshold+'% mem>'+j.memoryThreshold+'% restarts>'+j.restartThreshold+') ===',
  j.resourceIssuesResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== PERFORMANCE METRICS - ' + j.namespace + ' (getPerformanceMetrics) ===',
  j.performanceResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== POD DISRUPTIONS - 24h (analyzePodDisruptions) ===',
  j.podDisruptionsResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== NODES CPU/MEM TOP (k8s-mcp: nodes_top) ===',
  j.nodesTopResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== RECENT EVENTS - ' + j.namespace + ' (k8s-mcp: events_list) ===',
  j.eventsResult || 'N/A'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...j, aggregatedOutput: summary, aiPrompt: 'Analyze these OpenShift cluster health metrics. Provide: 1) Overall health score (0-100) with color-coded badge, 2) HTML table per category (cluster, nodes, resources, performance, disruptions, events) with status, 3) Top 3 critical issues, 4) Recommendations. Red Hat style inline CSS.' } }];
